entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 3
entry.content:
Thanks for joining 😺

Unfortunately, the hash does not look right. Make sure you entered the correct phrase and that the community ID is entered correctly. There was an earlier bug in the skeleton app that the string to hash was not bound to the input field – make sure the hash is being done correctly, even do it manually in the data resource on the Data tab.

entry.title: Re: Custom Events in SAP Event Mesh. Step-by-Step (Part 1 - Create a Custom Event)
entry.content:
I followed each step you described here . I created a subtype of BUS2007, and added new event named 'CHANGED' for new BO 'ZBUS2007V1' . And I configured an Outbound Object in SAP Add-on. 

I started my test on change document: I changed PM Work Order, I can find change document in CDHDR ,CDPOS and  in SWEL as well. 

I did test on TCode SWUE , the event of ZBUS2007V1 can be triggered. 

But , if I change the PM Work Order , the event 'CHANGED' was not triggered. 

Of course , I did the event linkage with change document object.

Could you help on this issue ?

entry.title: Re: NO INSTANCE PROFILES FOUND WHEN STARTING ABAP TRIAL DB
entry.content: It was already asked and answered multiple times. See for instance Solved: startsap fails with No instance profiles found - SAP Community.

entry.title: H1_2024 | Do we need to enable DisplayName standard field in Data model ?
entry.content:
With H1 2024 release a new field is arriving the standard field DisplayName

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_PLATFORM/534356acc0ab4b0e8977ebfb2eb432f7/0597651b7c4249bb851f9ff33baf79cd.html

DISPLAYNAME is automatically enabled in the Succession Data Model. You can see this element in the Business Configuration UI, but your updates to the element in BCUI won't take effect. This field is used for General Display Name. Please note that DISPLAYNAME here has nothing to do with display-name of Personal Information.

  • Import and export are supported for both Employee Central instances and non-Employee Central instances. But we don't recommend that you update the values of the field through import if Employee Central is enabled, because your updated values will be overwritten by HRIS sync or when you refresh the general display name.
  • In the import file, you can provide a new general display name or update the current display name of an employee.

can we troubleshoot problem of Display Name without it ?

entry.title: Production order costs analysis before settlement
entry.content:
Hello,

is there a T-Code to get the costs analysis before settlement of a settled production order?

Regards

Tony

entry.title: Delete Dunning Runs & Reset Dunning Data
entry.content:
I want to Delete Old Dunning Runs and resetting Dunning Levels & Data

Reason:

  1. I want to test Data that already Had the Dunning Printout Set to Complete
    • we can't use the same data interval 
    • you can't use older dates than the one used in the latest run
    • due to certain Condition i don't know about, new runs are not going through 
  2. Garbage Old Runs that I want to remove

entry.title: Define correct costing lot size (avoid lot size variance)
entry.content:
Hello,

I need your support, because I think that we use SAP system in the wrong way. The post refers to costing lot size, lot size variance and order planning.

For an exemplary product, we set 4 hours as setup time in the recipe and 30.000 ea as costing lot size in material master (costing 1). When we create the production plan, we split a run in several production orders that are processed one after the other. For example: PO 1 = 10.000 ea, PO 2 = 10.000 ea, PO 3 = 10.000 ea, run size = 30.000 ea. During production, we confirm 4 setup hours for PO 1 and 0 setup hours for PO 2 and 3.

When we check the cost analysis after period settlement, each PO has a target quantity of 4 hours for setup. Therefore, we receive a lot size variance for each PO.

For understanding, we need 4 hours to set up the machine for the product. A run can take several days which is why we split it into several POs. Otherwise we have to wait till the end of the run to release and ship the product. 

Question: What are we doing wrong or what do we need to change to avoid lot size variance?

Feel free to ask if you need further information for understanding.

Regards

Tony

entry.title: Re: Delete Dunning Runs & Reset Dunning Data
entry.content:
Collective Create Dunning Notice Printout Issues Solutions : 

Deleting Old Dunning Runs :

  • SAP Community Blog : Delete Dunning Runs 
    • SAP Note 12896  : Error message FM120 during dunning
    • SAP Note 186095  :Deleting lock entries in MAHNS
    • SAP Note 1649694 : Error message FM120 or FM861 in the dunning run

Reset Dunning Data Using Runs :

  • Sap Note : 6591 Resetting Dunning Data & Levels 
    • Se38 : RFCORR14 : Reset all dunning Data including levels

  • According to : SAP NOTE 1318067 
    • You cannot use the report RFCORR14 for resetting in the case of an individual dunning notice, Check Note For Solution

There was an error also while i am printing :

In dunning third level i got a table error (t056z) interest indicator 01, currency INR is missing in table t056z.

  • Solved : Interest Indicator  
    • you are not maintained Interest Rates for for interest indicator 01, go to Tcode:OB42 and make your entry.

entry.title: Creating ABAP Dataframes for SAP PAL
entry.content:
Machine learning algorithms often need large datasets for training. E.g. the MNIST dataset consists of 100.000 records. Each record represents a little greyscale image of size 28x28 pixels of a handwritten number and the respective number as integer value ,  i.e. 28x28 =  784 integer values in the range interval [0,255] and one integer value for the number value.

Assume you want to train a neural network in PAL using AMDP (ABAP managed database procedures) in order to predict the number. For this task you could e.g. use the PAL algorithm "Multilayer Perceptron", which is a neural network. In order to supply the input neurons with data a dataframe is needed, i.e. an ABAP-DDIC structure containing the following fields:

ID = Identifier of the record

Y = dependent variable = predicted (classified) value

X1 = Independent variable 1 = greyscale value of pixel 1

X2 = Independent variable 2 = greyscale value of pixel 2

...

X784 = Independent variable 784 = greyscale value of pixel 784.

This data structure and it's corresponding table will contain the input data for the neural network. Of course it is possible to create such a DDIC structure by hand. But creating a structure with 786 components costs a lot of time. Since most of the component names can be derived from other data the structure can be generated automatically. The following ABAP shows the code in order to create a DDIC structure and a DDIC table type for the MNIST example:   

 

*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
*& Report /COW/NN_DDIC_CREATOR
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
*&
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
REPORT /cow/pal_ddic_creator.


DATA: ls_comp   TYPE /COW/PAL_s_COMP,
      lt_comp   TYPE /cow/pal_t_comp,
      lv_string TYPE string.

PARAMETERS: p_struc TYPE tabname DEFAULT 'ZZZ_S_TEST_1',
            p_ttyp  TYPE tabname DEFAULT 'ZZZ_T_TEST_1',
            p_dev   TYPE devclass DEFAULT '$TMP',
            p_descr TYPE text60 DEFAULT 'Description'.

TRY.
    ls_comp-name = 'ID'.
    ls_comp-ddic_type = '/COW/PAL_ID'.
    APPEND ls_comp TO lt_comp.

    DO 784 TIMES.
      lv_string = sy-index.
      ls_comp-name = 'X_' && |{ lv_string }|.
      ls_comp-ddic_type = '/COW/PAL_FLOAT'.
      APPEND ls_comp TO lt_comp.
    ENDDO.

    /cow/cl_pal_ddic_util=>static_create_ddic_struc(
        it_comp      = lt_comp
        iv_strucname = p_struc
        iv_tabname   = p_ttyp
        iv_descr     = p_descr
        iv_devclass  = p_dev ).
  CATCH /cow/cx_root INTO DATA(lo_exc).
    lo_exc->to_message( ).
ENDTRY.

 

The generation of the DDIC structure is done in the method /COW/CL_PAL_DDIC_UTIL =>STATIC_CREATE_DDIC_STRUCTURE:

 

class /COW/CL_PAL_DDIC_UTIL definition
  public
  final
  create public .

public section.

  class-methods STATIC_CREATE_DDIC_STRUC
    importing
      !IT_COMP type /COW/PAL_T_COMP
      !IV_STRUCNAME type TABNAME
      !IV_TABNAME type TABNAME
      !IV_DESCR type TEXT60
      !IV_DEVCLASS type DEVCLASS
    raising
      /COW/CX_ROOT .
protected section.
private section.
ENDCLASS.



CLASS /COW/CL_PAL_DDIC_UTIL IMPLEMENTATION.


* <SIGNATURE>---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
* | Static Public Method /COW/CL_PAL_DDIC_UTIL=>STATIC_CREATE_DDIC_STRUC
* +-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
* | [--->] IT_COMP                        TYPE        /COW/PAL_T_COMP
* | [--->] IV_STRUCNAME                   TYPE        TABNAME
* | [--->] IV_TABNAME                     TYPE        TABNAME
* | [--->] IV_DESCR                       TYPE        TEXT60
* | [--->] IV_DEVCLASS                    TYPE        DEVCLASS
* | [!CX!] /COW/CX_ROOT
* +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------</SIGNATURE>
  METHOD static_create_ddic_struc.

    DATA: ls_dd02v   TYPE dd02v,
          ls_dd09v   TYPE dd09v,
          lt_dd03p   TYPE TABLE OF dd03p,
          ls_dd03p   TYPE  dd03p,
          ls_message TYPE bapiret2,
          ls_dd40v   TYPE dd40v.


*   1.) Create structure
*   Fill header
    ls_dd02v-tabname = iv_strucname.
    ls_dd02v-ddlanguage = sy-langu.
    ls_dd02v-tabclass = 'INTTAB'.
    ls_dd02v-exclass  = '3'.
    ls_dd02v-ddtext = iv_descr.
    ls_dd02v-as4user = sy-uname.
    ls_dd02v-as4date = sy-datum.
    ls_dd02v-as4time = sy-uzeit.
    ls_dd02v-exclass = '1'.

*   Fields
    LOOP AT it_comp ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<ls_comp>).
      DATA(lv_tabix) = sy-tabix.
      ls_dd03p-tabname = iv_strucname.
      ls_dd03p-fieldname = <ls_comp>-name.
      ls_dd03p-fieldname = ls_dd03p-fieldname.
      TRANSLATE ls_dd03p-fieldname TO UPPER CASE.
      ls_dd03p-rollname = <ls_comp>-ddic_type.
      ls_dd03p-ddlanguage = 'D'.
      ls_dd03p-position = lv_tabix.
      APPEND ls_dd03p TO lt_dd03p.
    ENDLOOP.

    CALL FUNCTION 'DDIF_TABL_PUT'
      EXPORTING
*       CTRL_TABL_PUT       = 'XXXXXX'
        dd02v_wa            = ls_dd02v
        name                = iv_strucname
      TABLES
        dd03p_tab           = lt_dd03p
      EXCEPTIONS
        db_access_failure   = 1
        object_inconsistent = 2
        OTHERS              = 3.
    IF sy-subrc <> 0.
      ls_message-id = '/COW/MESS_PAL'.
      ls_message-number = '000'.
      ls_message-type = 'E'.
      ls_message-message_v1 = iv_tabname.
      RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE /cow/cx_root
        EXPORTING
          gs_message = ls_message.
    ENDIF.

    CALL FUNCTION 'DDIF_TABL_ACTIVATE'
      EXPORTING
        name        = iv_strucname
        excommit    = abap_false
      EXCEPTIONS
        not_found   = 1
        put_failure = 2
        OTHERS      = 3.


    DATA: lv_objname   TYPE tadir-obj_name,
          lv_srcsystem TYPE tadir-srcsystem.

    lv_objname = iv_strucname.
    lv_srcsystem = sy-sysid.

*   TADIR
    CALL FUNCTION 'TR_TADIR_INTERFACE'
      EXPORTING
        wi_test_modus      = space
        wi_tadir_pgmid     = 'R3TR'
        wi_tadir_object    = 'TABL'
        wi_tadir_obj_name  = lv_objname
        wi_tadir_srcsystem = lv_srcsystem
        wi_tadir_author    = sy-uname
        wi_tadir_devclass  = iv_devclass
        wi_set_genflag     = 'X'
      EXCEPTIONS
        OTHERS             = 25.

*   2.) Create table type
    ls_dd40v-typename   = iv_tabname.
    ls_dd40v-rowtype    = iv_strucname.
    ls_dd40v-rowkind    = 'S'.
    ls_dd40v-accessmode = 'T'.
    ls_dd40v-keydef     = 'D'.
    ls_dd40v-keykind    = 'G'.
    ls_dd40v-ddlanguage = sy-langu.
    ls_dd40v-ddtext     = iv_descr.

    CALL FUNCTION 'DDIF_TTYP_PUT'
      EXPORTING
        name              = iv_tabname
        dd40v_wa          = ls_dd40v
      EXCEPTIONS
        ttyp_not_found    = 1
        name_inconsistent = 2
        ttyp_inconsistent = 3
        put_failure       = 4
        put_refused       = 5
        OTHERS            = 6.
    IF sy-subrc <> 0.
      ls_message-id = '/COW/MESS_PAL'.
      ls_message-number = '001'.
      ls_message-type = 'E'.
      ls_message-message_v1 = iv_tabname.
      RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE /cow/cx_root
        EXPORTING
          gs_message = ls_message.
    ENDIF.

    CALL FUNCTION 'DDIF_TTYP_ACTIVATE'
      EXPORTING
        name        = iv_tabname
      EXCEPTIONS
        not_found   = 1
        put_failure = 2
        OTHERS      = 3.

    lv_objname = iv_tabname.
    lv_srcsystem = sy-sysid.
*   TADIR
    CALL FUNCTION 'TR_TADIR_INTERFACE'
      EXPORTING
        wi_test_modus      = space
        wi_tadir_pgmid     = 'R3TR'
        wi_tadir_object    = 'TTYP'
        wi_tadir_obj_name  = lv_objname
        wi_tadir_srcsystem = lv_srcsystem
        wi_tadir_author    = sy-uname
        wi_tadir_devclass  = iv_devclass
        wi_set_genflag     = 'X'
      EXCEPTIONS
        OTHERS             = 25.

  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

 

The result:

This code can easily be re-used by substituting the namespace /COW/ by a customer namespace. Of course the program can easily be adapted to other dataframe requirements.

entry.title: Re: CF SSH stopped working

entry.title: Asset technical gl clearing concept

entry.title: Re: Creating ABAP Dataframes for SAP PAL
entry.content: Thanks. Note that the DDIF function modules have been superseded by XCO (Design of the XCO Generation APIs | SAP Help Portal) since ABAP 7.56. Example for ABAP Dictionary objects: Create ABAP Dictionary Objects Using XCO Library - SAP Community.

entry.title: Re: Invalid value of "AppName" in MDKProject.json. It sho...
entry.content: @devangelgb The Cloud build service currently doesn't accept space in its Device App Name property.  Remove spaces in the AppName property in MDKProject.json file, zip it and then upload. The original error should be gone by bow.

entry.title: Re: Rounding Residuals-Decimal Dust
entry.content:
Wonderful Article. Quite inciteful I might add. However, there is a problem that I am facing. 

I have material conversion activated as my base UoM is KG and my AUoM is CAR (KAR). Further, my materials are batch managed. so in case there is any rounding residual created in the system, the material and batch combination restricts the accumulation to the point that I may execute the cleanup process. 

The rounding residual appears in the /SSCWM/AQUA table and causes reports that i have generated to mismatch from the original SAP /SCWM/MON report. 

How may I remove the rounding residual from the system? Need Advise.

entry.title: Re: Recommended approach for Fiori Adapt UI in S/4H On-Pr...

I would recommend you to go thru the blog https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/extensibility-in-the-sap-s-4hana-cloud-extended-edition/ba-p/13465336 and follow the steps provided by Jocelyn.

Thanks and Regards,
Prasanth

entry.title: Re: Set SAC standard Filter (Filter Panel) to display "ID...
entry.content:
Hi nick_scott, 

   I'm not sure if I understand you correctly, but if you toggle display to 'ID & Description' at story edit time and save it, this will be become default for end user at story view time. 

Best regards, William

entry.title: SAP CAL Applicance S4HANA trial activation on GCP provider
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts,

I am trying to activate S4HANA trial appliance on GCP. I have followed all the steps as per the blogs. 

getting the error related to the quotas like N2_CPUS while activating the appliance. Can you please help here as i am preparing for some demos. Appreciate your response. 

Also, i have terminated the appliance now. Hope there are no costs involved. can i try the appliance activation again once you suggest a solution now? 

Thanks a lot again for your help. Looking forward for a resolution.

Srini

entry.title: Re: Crystal Report for Visual Studio 2022 on Windows 11 ARM
entry.content:
No errors during installation, the error appears within visual studio when I try to view the components to insert into a form. Error text (traslated):

the Crystal Reports Tools Package was not loaded correctly. The problem may be due to a configuration change or the installation of another extension. For more information, review the file C: Users\roberto \AppData Roaming \Microsoft VisualStudio\1 7.0_f5112977\ActivityLog.xml*. Restarting Visual Studio may resolve the issue. Continue to see the error message?

--- and ---

the PiDesigner Package was not loaded correctly. The problem may be due to a configuration change or the installation of another extension. For more information, review the file 'C:\Users\roberto\AppData\Roaming\Microsoft\VisualStudio\1 7.0_f5112977\ActivityLog.xml*. Restarting Visual Studio may resolve the issue. Continue to see the error message?

--- In ActivityLog.xml :

No InprocServer32 registered for package [VsRptDesigner Package] C:\Program Files (x86)\SAP BusinessObjects\Crystal Reports for .NET Framework 4.0\Common\SAP BusinessObjects Enterprise XI 4.0\win64_x64\CRDesigner.dll {C0A76456-F970-471A-B209-8D35F6CD9119} 0x800700c1

---- And ---

No InprocServer32 registered for package [Crystal Reports Tools Package] C:\Program Files (x86)\SAP BusinessObjects\Crystal Reports for .NET Framework 4.0\Common\SAP BusinessObjects Enterprise XI 4.0\win64_x64\CRVsPackage.dll {FE73BB80-53F4-4AD0-A5F9-6A0BCE662292} 0x800700c1

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 4 - Mobile device capabilities
entry.content:
It's very strange, in the sense that, whenever I click on one of the places loaded, the Get Photos API call is not getting triggered (nothing shows up in the Network tab of the DevTools; for the Get Details, there is a call and the details of that particular location are loaded). However, when I'm editing it in the UI Canvas, photos of a sample location are loaded.

Regarding point 2 : I also tried adding the formula @Dan_Wroblewski used, but now, when I click the button, nothing is happening.

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 4 - Mobile device capabilities
entry.content:
Hi ,

Couple of things to check:

1) Whether the page parameters are getting passed correctly from home page and make sure they have the same name as you have defined them in the details page. 

2) On the details page, where you setting your data variable with the Get Record Collection in the logic canvas of the data variable, try to put a JS after the "Get Record Collection" and observe if the API call is happening correctly or not. Also while the data variable gets called, the fsq_id gets passed, so pay attention if the fsq_id is getting passed correctly or not. This is where the page parameters will play an important role.

entry.title: Want to download PDF from Spool using 'CONVERT_ABAPSPOOLJOB_2_PDF'
entry.content:
Hi ABAPers, I want to Download the PDF file using Program which is already generated in the SPOOL, I Tried using the below code

FM CALL FUNCTION 'CONVERT_ABAPSPOOLJOB_2_PDF'
    EXPORTING
      src_spoolid              = lv_spool_id
      no_dialog                = 'X'
      dst_device               = 'PDF1'
      pdf_destination          = 'X'
    IMPORTING
      pdf_bytecount            = lv_bin_size
      pdf_spoolid              = ev_spoolid
      bin_file                 = lv_xstring
    TABLES
      pdf                      = lta_lt_pdf
    EXCEPTIONS
      err_no_abap_spooljob     = 1
      err_no_spooljob          = 2
      err_no_permission        = 3
      err_conv_not_possible    = 4
      err_bad_destdevice       = 5
      user_cancelled           = 6
      err_spoolerror           = 7
      err_temseerror           = 8
      err_btcjob_open_failed   = 9
      err_btcjob_submit_failed = 10
      err_btcjob_close_failed  = 11
      OTHERS                   = 12.
  IF sy-subrc <> 0.
* Implement suitable error handling here
  ENDIF.
 LTA_LT_PDF internal table is getting not any data from the FM, I can only see the binsize and xstring getting filled up, How to proceed further, Tried to convert xstring to PDF using  

CALL FUNCTION 'SCMS_XSTRING_TO_BINARY'
    EXPORTING
      buffer     = lv_xstring
    TABLES
      binary_tab = data_tab.
and

CALL FUNCTION 'GUI_DOWNLOAD'
    EXPORTING
      bin_filesize            = lv_bin_size
      filename                = lv_path
      filetype                = 'BIN'
    TABLES
      data_tab                = data_tab
    EXCEPTIONS
      file_write_error        = 1
      no_batch                = 2
      gui_refuse_filetransfer = 3
      invalid_type            = 4
      no_authority            = 5
      unknown_error           = 6
      header_not_allowed      = 7
      separator_not_allowed   = 8
      filesize_not_allowed    = 9
      header_too_long         = 10
      dp_error_create         = 11
      dp_error_send           = 12
      dp_error_write          = 13
      unknown_dp_error        = 14
      access_denied           = 15
      dp_out_of_memory        = 16
      disk_full               = 17
      dp_timeout              = 18
      file_not_found          = 19
      dataprovider_exception  = 20
      control_flush_error     = 21
      OTHERS                  = 22.
  IF sy-subrc <> 0.
* Implement suitable error handling here
  ENDIF.

 

But PDF which is getting downloading looks corrupted, What could be the reason?

With our intuitive platform and enticing rewards, accumulating LXP-L points. Take action now – register and start boosting your rewards!

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 4 - Mobile device capabilities
entry.content:
Couple of holes I fell into:

  • I used the id field instead of the correct fsq_id field.
  • My photo API was working but the images were not displayed, and only after I specified an exact width did they appear.
  • If you do not see any network activity, then make sure you have a flow function actually making the call -- this is very curious you do not have an API call. If you have to add one manually, do so.
  • I copied by get record collection and set data variable flow functions from data pane to page logic pane, but hen the output for the set data variable is no longer valid, and I forgot for a while to reset this to the output for the current page's get record collection.
  • Also, briefly, for some reason I cannot explain, my data variable had the places API fields when I went to bind data items in repeat.

Just take it step by step in order to debug, for example:

  1. Does the data resource Test work?
  2. Is the data variable running flow function and returning data?
  3. Is the UI component bound properly?
  4. ...

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Work Zone: Integrate SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud content to SAP Mobile Start
entry.content:
Hi @Amith_Nair ,

Thanks for such detailed information. We followed the steps and we are now able to get the roles and the role specific tiles in BWZ site. The users are successfully authenticated to login with our identity provider. But, when we click on the tiles, it's again asking for user credentials; and no credentials are working here.

Any idea, what might have gone wrong here?

Regards,

Anupam

entry.title: Re: 3 ways to build a website on a tight budget
entry.content:
Your explanation about making a website was so clear! It's like you said, websites are just like online business cards. They're super important for showing people who you are and what you do, whether you're selling stuff or offering services.

I totally get what you mean about SAP Consultants having blogs to show off their skills. And your WordPress site sounds awesome too! It's like having a digital portfolio to show off to anyone who wants to know more about you and your work. Thanks for breaking it down, man!

entry.title: Managers can now create Employee Central Quick Actions for Positions
entry.content:
With the 1H 2024 Release, On the Company Info page, the My Team Positions page can be used to manage and update the positions by managers or supervisors. With the new My Team Position feature you can now use templates to create Quick actions for positions for managers

My team position is available under quick actions on the home page and is available upon activating the Role-based permissions for My team position. You can enable it as follows -

Administrator Permissions--> Manage Business Configuration -->Employee Central Quick Action Template permission.

 

Once the permissions are enabled my team positions will be available for managers under company info.

 

Under quick actions

 

 

Once these available templates are configured. The following templates are available –

 

  1. Create Same-Level Position (Copy Rule)
  2. Create Same-Level Position (Copy All Fields)
  3. Change Location of Position
  4. Change Job Details of Position
  5. Change Organizational Data of Position

 

To configure the template, go to Manager data --> create --> select employee central quick action template. Select the use case. Here I have selected “Change Organizational Data of Position”.

Provide quick Action name. I have given “Change Organizational Data of Position”

 

Select the position information as follows –

 

Base object – Position

Field – Department, division, business unit, company, cost center. You can select up to 8 fields. Save.

 

 

 

The permission above quick action under User permissions à Employee Central Quick Actions

 

 

 

Now login as a manager or proxy as a manager. Following Action will be available under my Team positions.

 

 

Managers can now click on this action to change Department, division, business unit, company, or cost center and synchronize with Job information on people profile.

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 4 - Mobile device capabilities
entry.content:
Thank you @YogSSohanee & @Dan_Wroblewski for the help. As it turns out, I didn't maintain the fsq_id for the Photos API (for the Details API it was maintained) 🙈

Regarding part 2 : I manage to return the correct distance (I see that from an Alert in the Logic Canvas), however, the description is not getting updated with the updated page variable. I guess I'll have to do a Javascript to update that particular text

How to make it display pretty?

e.g. Want to download PDF from Spool using 'CONVERT_ABA... - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: How to post code in SAP Community >=2024
entry.content:
First click on "..." (Expand toolbar):

Then position your cursor where you want to insert your code and and click "</>" (Insert/Edit code sample):

Select the code language, paste your code and click OK:

Now the code is displayed with color and monospaced font:

Note that if you edit your post again, there is a bug about blank lines added before and after the code, SAP is informed and it will be fixed → Blog editor does strange changes - SAP Community (last update: April 24th, 2024).

entry.title: Re: Want to download PDF from Spool using 'CONVERT_ABAPSPOOLJOB_2_PDF'
entry.content:
Please format your code nicely. See Solved: How to post code in SAP Community >=2024 - SAP Community.

e.g. see how it looks after:

CALL FUNCTION 'SCMS_XSTRING_TO_BINARY'
    EXPORTING
      buffer     = lv_xstring
    TABLES
      binary_tab = data_tab.

entry.title: ERMS - What is the xpath expression when creating a new attribute?
entry.content:
Hello together, when creating a new attribute for the rule modeler it has to be provided an XPATH Expression: 

Can we choose any xpath we want or how to identify the correct XPATH for the new attribute?

entry.title: Re: Want to download PDF from Spool using 'CONVERT_ABAPSPOOLJOB_2_PDF'
entry.content:
First of all, there are several types of spool requests, ABAP List, OTF (SAPScript Form, Smart Form), Adobe PDF, etc.

CONVERT_ABAPSPOOLJOB_2_PDF is only for spool requests of type ABAP List.

If you use PDF_DESTINATION = 'X', only the parameter BIN_FILE is filled (not PDF_BYTECOUNT and not PDF).

One possible solution (among others): don't use PDF_DESTINATION (same as passing it = space) which will fill the parameters PDF_BYTECOUNT and PDF, declare LTA_LX_PDF of type SOLIX_TAB (lines with one component of type X and length 256), no need of SCMS_XSTRING_TO_BINARY, download with BIN_FILESIZE = lv_bin_size and DATA_TAB = lta_lx_pdf.

entry.title: Step Back in Time with SAP Inside Track Belgium 2024!
entry.content:
Hello SAP enthusiasts!

We are thrilled to announce that the next SAP Inside Track event will take place on Saturday, September 21, 2024, at the Arηs Group offices located at Ikaroslaan 53, 1930 Zaventem, Belgium. This year, we're taking a delightful journey back in time with our theme: Old Skool.

 

What to Expect

As always, prepare to dive into the latest and greatest of what SAP has to offer.  What is special about this year's edition is that we will also honour the legacy of SAP and include some references to the Old Skool way of doing things. 

Why use a webservice if you can download a file, write it to a floppy and physically deliver the info, right? 

We are currently building our agenda and would love to hear from you. Stay tuned for our upcoming call for speakers!

A Little Fun Along the Way

Get ready for a nostalgic twist with our SAP pop quiz! Test your knowledge of SAP’s history and maybe even surprise yourself with how much you know about the origins of R/3 and R/2.

A Big Thank You to Arηs

We would like to extend a heartfelt thank you to Arηs Group for hosting us. Their support makes it possible to bring our community together and share our passion for SAP technologies in a fantastic setting.

For those who are wondering what the η character signifies: Arηs (/aris/) stands for “Advanced and Reliable Information Systems”. Eta (η) is the seventh letter of the Greek alphabet pronounced /i/, and translated into H in the Latin alphabet. 

(Might come in handy at a pop quiz... who knows 🤭)

Join Us!

Don’t miss out on this unique opportunity to connect with fellow SAP professionals, share experiences, and gain insights. You can subscribe to the event here. Spots are limited, so make sure to secure yours soon!

More information

More information on the detailed agenda will be made available through the website and twitter.

We can't wait to see you there and explore the nostalgic world of SAP together. Mark your calendars and get ready for a blast from the past that promises to be both enlightening and fun!

Looking forward to seeing you there and making this year's edition a memorable one!!

entry.title: Find busiest CarrierId based on FlightDate using SAP CDS View
entry.content:
Hi Experts ,
I need to get the below expected output. Let me explain: as 07.04 CarrierId has highest number of trip that is 4 so it should be the output instead of 10.02. All other entries have single entry based on date so it will be in output.

Input data:

CarrierID Connection ID FlightDate Price
UA175010.02.2024250
UA189007.04.2024450
UA276007.04.2024150
UA197007.04.2024100
AA349011.04.2024340
AA196013.04.2024560
SQ349015.05.2014120

 

Expected output:

CarrierID FlightDate
UA07.04.2024
AA11.04.2024
AA13.04.2024
SQ15.05.2014

I tried to create two CDS Views to solve the issue but I can only get the busiest CarrierId without date in output. But requirement is to display the date with CarrierID.

I tried to find output with the below views:

  1. define view entity View1 as select from /dmo/booking  
{
 key carrier_id as CarrierId,
     flight_date as FlightDate,     
  count(*) as FlightCount   
}
group by
 carrier_id,flight_date
  2. define view entity View2 as select from View1
{
 key CarrierId as CarrierId,
     FlightDate as FlightDate,
 max(FlightCount) as Numberofflight
}group by CarrierId

    This view is not working as we need to add non-aggregated fields in the Group By clause but if I add FlightDate in the Group By then the output will be different.

entry.title: Vendor Subrange
entry.content:
Vendor Subrange for order currency.

Let’s consider we have one vendor i.e. “XYZ LTD.” which is maintained for
some specific Purchase Organization “CP00” for Order currency “INR”

But the same vendor can also accept multiple currency like INR, USD, EUR, & AED
etc.  

We can assign multiple order currency for single plant also and for one vendor.
So for that we need to maintain the vendor order currency for three different
countries for this purpose SAP define the Vendor Sub-Range & Can assign
respective Ordered currency & Partner function each one of those.

Create a New Vendor Mater Record by using T-Code: - XK01

Under the Purchasing view click on Different data as shown below.

By click on this system will give below message

Click on YES

Enter the Vendor Subrange & VSR Description.
➔ Enter the Plant & Tick on Purchasing Data.
➔ Press enter.

Enter the Order Currency & Terms of Payment.

Again create Another Vendor Sub Range for another currency as below.

Enter the Order Currency & Terms of Payment. For Second VSR.

Save the data.

By display the Vendor by using T-Code: - XK03 check the VSR created as
below.

Same vendor number but we assigned multiple order currencies.

While creating Purchase order we can use supplier subrange to choose the required currency 

As per this we can set the Multiple Ordered Currency for Single Plant & well as for Different Plant & same Vendor also.

All the remaining procedure is Same as P2P cycle.

Thankyou.

entry.title: How to ask a question in SAP Community >= 2024
entry.content: I'm a little bit lost in the SAP Community, what is the right way to ask a question or find a solution to my question.

entry.title: Re: How to ask a question in SAP Community >= 2024
entry.content:
It's officially explained here: How do I ask a question - Help - SAP Community.

Choose the adequate group:

Choose the Q&A board in the selected group (here, it was the Technology group):

You may then enter the title of your question in order to see other similar questions and check their answers. If they don't answer your question, try to refine your question, and click Continue only if you have found nothing:

Do not immediately click on Continue. First, click any of the proposed answers to see their details:

You may right-click "More about this topic" and then "Open link in new tab" to see the details of all answers and comments in another tab:

If there's nothing which answers your question, then click Continue to create your own question.

Additionally, pay attention to post in a Q&A group (e.g. developer/programming questions should be posted in Technology Q&A) excluding SAP Websites Q&A (it's reserved to questions about sap.com Websites like e.g SAP Community usage, SAP for Me (SAP Support), SAP Library, SAP Developer Center, etc.) If you don't post to a Q&A group (i.e. if you post in a Discussion group like e.g. the Application Development group, or if you post a comment), you won't be able to mark the good answer as The Solution and so future visitors won't find it easily. NB: you can't move a Discussion to a Q&A group, you can only recreate the question in a Q&A group.

If you post some code, please be nice with your readers by using the beautify feature: Solved: How to post code in SAP Community >=2024 - SAP Community.

entry.title: Re: S4H - the transfer of simulation version into the act...

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 4 - Mobile device capabilities
entry.content:
First, nice screenshots of the app 🎉

The string to hash is the name of the object in the formula editor that contains all the values for native mobile capabilities, like latitude or gyroscope or accelerometer

entry.title: Re: On Uploading PDF or PPt File Getting 403 Error Forbidden
entry.content: HI Ulrich_Schmidt,

entry.title: Re: On Uploading PDF or PPt File Getting 403 Error Forbidden
entry.content:
HI Ulrich_Schmidt 

Thanks for the suggestion , but i checked this in Trace and there i found that its returning 403 Forbidden error in network section.

but the request is not reaching to Gateway server.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: S4H - the transfer of simulation version into the act...
entry.content: Hi Caetano, I was expecting the following when we copy the planned orders from the simulation version: the planned orders will be copied 1:1 and hence they will create secondary demand for the components. But very often I see that planned orders are copied but no secondary demand is created for the components

entry.title: RFC to receive PDF files
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I'm working on a scenario which is related to SFTP to RFC. Where I need to pass pdf files from a SFTP server to RFC. Please let me know which type to RFC destination(Example:- ABAP, HTTP Connection to External Server, Internal Connection, TCP/IP Connection) and function module I've to create so that it can receive pdf files.

Thanks and Regards,
Sufiyan.

entry.title: \/SAPAPO/SDP94 issue - Initial column cannot be inserted
entry.content:
Hello Team,

When I am running the tcode /SAPAPO/SDP94 in APO, I'm getting the information window Initial column cannot be inserted and Data view is loaded without columns including initial column. This is SNP data view. Encountering the issue with only  one data view. Please advise.

Thank you!
